SEO Pricing

SEO pricing thatmatches your market.

No hidden fees. No vague retainers. You see what is included at each tier before you sign anything.

Get a Custom SEO QuoteSEO Services
At a Glance

KINEXIS SEO plans start at $2,500 per month for single-location businesses and scale to $8,000+ for competitive markets or multi-location brands. Every plan includes technical SEO, keyword strategy, on-page work, content production (2 to 8+ pieces per month by tier), and link building. Ad spend is not part of SEO pricing. Most clients need four to six months before lead volume clearly improves. Need map pack work only? See Local SEO pricing. Already have an SEO team and need production volume? See Content Marketing pricing.

Month to month

No long-term lock-in

8–10 clients

Focused roster, not a factory

Fixed scope

Quoted before you sign

Growth tier in practice

4.8X lead growth
for Landscaping Co.

What's included at each SEO tier

All plans include core SEO work. Higher tiers add content volume, link velocity, and strategy depth.

Entry level

Starter

Best for: Local service businesses getting started with SEO

  • Technical SEO audit and fixes

    Yes

  • Keyword research and mapping

    Yes

  • Content pieces per month

    2

  • Link building outreach

    Basic

  • Multi-location support

    1 location

  • Strategy call frequency

    Monthly

Starting investment

$2,500/mo

Recommended starting point

Growth

Best for: Growing brands ready to invest in content and authority

  • Technical SEO audit and fixes

    Yes

  • Keyword research and mapping

    Yes

  • Content pieces per month

    4

  • Link building outreach

    Active

  • Multi-location support

    Up to 3

  • Strategy call frequency

    Bi-weekly

Starting investment

$5,000/mo

Scale tier

Scale

Best for: Multi-location or high-competition industries

  • Technical SEO audit and fixes

    Yes

  • Keyword research and mapping

    Yes

  • Content pieces per month

    8+

  • Link building outreach

    Aggressive

  • Multi-location support

    Unlimited

  • Strategy call frequency

    Weekly

Starting investment

$8,000+/mo

Pricing reflects management and strategy. Content production costs vary by volume and are quoted separately.

What's included

A full organic growth system from audit through ongoing optimization.

Scope of work

  • Technical SEO Audit

    Crawl analysis, Core Web Vitals, indexation fixes, and schema markup on revenue-critical pages.

  • Keyword & Content Strategy

    Buyer-intent keyword mapping, content gap analysis, and a publishing calendar tied to your funnel.

  • On-Page Optimization

    Title tags, headings, internal links, and page structure on pages that drive conversions.

  • Content Production

    Service pages, blog articles, and landing pages written for search intent and qualified traffic.

  • Link Building & Digital PR

    Targeted outreach, guest placements, and authority links from relevant sources in your industry.

  • Monthly Performance Reporting

    Rankings, organic traffic, leads, and pipeline contribution. Actionable data, not a vanity dashboard.

Common Questions

FAQ

Is there a setup fee for SEO?>

Most engagements include a one-time audit and strategy phase in month one. We quote this clearly before you start. There are no surprise onboarding charges.

Do you require a 12-month contract?>

No. We work month to month because results should earn your business, not a contract clause.

What affects my SEO price?>

Competition level, number of locations, current site condition, and how much content and link building your market requires. We scope this in a strategy call, not a generic quote form.

Can I start with a smaller plan and upgrade?>

Yes. Many clients start on Starter and move to Growth once rankings and content momentum build. We plan the upgrade path upfront so you are not rebuilding from scratch.

How long before we see results?>

Meaningful ranking movement typically starts within 60 to 90 days. Lead volume changes usually show in months 4 to 6 as traffic compounds. We track leading indicators from day one so you can see progress before conversions peak.

What do I need to have ready before we start?>

Access to your Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and Google Business Profile if you have them. We handle everything else including the technical audit, keyword mapping, and content strategy. If you do not have these set up yet, we configure them in week one.

Do you work with businesses in regulated industries?>

Yes. We have run SEO for healthcare, legal, and financial services businesses. We understand compliance constraints around medical and legal claims and build content strategies that rank without creating liability.

How do you report results?>

Weekly rank tracking reports covering your target keywords and local pack positions. Monthly dashboards covering organic traffic, leads by source, conversion rate, and ranking trends. You see the same numbers we see, tied to outcomes that matter to your business.

Do I need Local SEO or full SEO?>

If your business depends on map pack visibility and same-day calls in specific cities, start with Local SEO ($1,500/mo entry). Full SEO ($2,500/mo entry) covers technical site work, content, and link building for broader organic growth. Many local service businesses run both. We recommend the right mix on a strategy call.

How is SEO content different from a content marketing retainer?>

SEO plans include content production tied to keyword strategy, technical fixes, and link building. Content marketing retainers ($2,000/mo entry) are for teams that already handle SEO in-house and need standalone article and landing page production. If you need the full organic program, SEO is usually the better fit.
